title: upostmsg.dll
text: upostmsg.dll Implementation of the Message Utility. Applications can call this API directly. The function interface is: int UPostMessage ( char * NetworkPath : IN char * Destination : IN char * MessageID : IN char * MessageData : IN ) Copy Parameters NetworkPath —path to the Uniface Router: HostID { + PortNumber } | UserName . Destination —name of the targeted component instance: InstPath : { InstName }. InstPath —Uniface Server Type (UST) InstName —name of the component instance. If not present or if no component instance with the specified name can be found in the receiving application, it is delivered to the receiveMessage trigger of the application shell. MessageID —identifier for the message. It must contain at least one non-blank character. Trailing blanks are ignored. MessageData —data of the message. When this is not a single string, enclose the message in double quotes ( " " ). The maximum lengths of these parameters are given in the table below. Return values If successful, the return value is zero. Table 1. Message API Errors Error Problem indication -12001 No host name specified -12002 Host name too long (PM_MAXHOST) -12003 No user name -12004 User name too long (PM_MAXUSER) -12005 No instance path specified -12006 Instance path too long (PM_MAXUST) -12007 Instance name too long (PM_MAXINSTANCE) -12009 Message ID too long (PM_MAXMSGDATA) -12011 Message data too long (PM_MAXMSGDATA) -12017 Initialize Socket failed -12018 Send string to the server failed -12019 Receive TCP Message failed Description The upostmsg.dll contains the implementation of the Message Utility. It provides the functionality for the umsgutil.exe program by way of the Uniface upostmessage function. Applications can call this API directly. Additionally, the upostmsg.lib library, located in the 3gl/lib subdirectory, is provided for linking purposes. Table 2. Message API limits Parameter description Literal name Limit Host name PM_MAXHOST 128 User name PM_MAXUSER 128 Instance path PM_MAXUST 16 Instance name PM_MAXINSTANCE 16 MessageID PM_MAXMSGID 32 Message data PM_MAXMSGDATA 512 Port number PM_MAXPORTNR 8 DNP PM_MAXDNP 16 Related Links umsgutil.exe Command line interface for the Message API Utility. postmessage Send a message from one component instance to another. Message API Utility The Message API Utility sends messages to a Uniface application from a non-Uniface Windows application using Uniface's remote postmessage mechanism. Was this topic helpful?
